## Phase Boundary

Fix type errors and complete unfinished functionality in the four epistemic engines

- EpistemicRuntime: `maintain()` properly chains all four engines but carries unnecessary R types
- RecallFinalizer: memory-only activation tracking, not wired to storage persistence
- ConceptEngine: `sdr_lookup` unused in discover signature per original contract
